controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? If not, steps 27-30 will be repeated.

steps.description: If the fibula is from the right leg, tick the "Right side leg" checkbox.

ui_parameter_binding.ui_text: (tick if fibula is the one from the right leg)

properties.text: (tick if fibula is the one from the right leg)

sub_operations.question: Is the fibula from the right leg?

choice_info.question: Is the fibula from the right leg?

ui_guidance.title: Is the fibula from the right leg?
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose Yes or No.

steps.description: In the "Select mandibular segmentation" section, choose the mandibular segmentation.

ui_guidance.title: Select the mandibular segmentation node
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter choice.

steps.description: In the "Select fibula segmentation" section, choose the fibula segmentation.

ui_guidance.title: Select the fibula segmentation node
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter choice.

steps.description: For the "Current Scalar Volume" option, select the Mandible Volume.

sub_operations.question: Select the mandible scalar volume node

choice_info.question: Select the mandible scalar volume node

ui_guidance.title: Select the mandible scalar volume node
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter choice.

steps.description: Click "Create bone models from segmentations" button.
Change the layout to "Conventional".

ui_guidance.title: Update layout
ui_guidance.instruction: Set layout to Conventional.

steps.description: For the R (red) view, toggle on "slice visibility in 3D view".

sub_operations.description: Show slice in 3D view for Red slice

ui_guidance.title: Toggle slice visibility in 3D for Red view

operation_descriptions: Show slice in 3D view for Red slice

steps.description: For the R (red) view, toggle on "FOV, Spacing match 2D" (adjusts slice resolution to match the 2D viewport pixel spacing).

sub_operations.description: Match FOV and spacing to 2D view for Red slice

ui_guidance.title: Toggle FOV/Spacing match 2D for Red view

operation_descriptions: Match FOV and spacing to 2D view for Red slice

steps.description: In the toolbar, turn on "slice intersection visibility". In the slice intersection interaction options, turn on "set interaction", then enable both "Translate" and "Rotate".

sub_operations.description: Configure slice intersection visibility and interaction modes

ui_guidance.title: Configure slice intersection
ui_guidance.instruction: Enable visibility, set interaction, and enable Translate/Rotate.

operation_descriptions: Configure slice intersection visibility and interaction modes

steps.description: Manually adjust the slice intersection position by translate and rotate of the cross lines in each view.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust slice intersection position via translate/rotate
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Translate and rotate slice intersection cross lines in each view

steps.placement_instructions: Translate and rotate slice intersection cross lines in each view

ui_guidance.title: Adjust slice intersection
ui_guidance.instruction: Translate/rotate intersection cross lines in each view.

steps.description: Click the "Add mandibular curve" button.
Configure the display settings of the mandibular curve created by the "Add mandibular curve" button so it is shown in both "View 1" and "Red".

sub_operations.description: Set mandibular curve display visibility in Red and View 1

ui_guidance.title: Configure mandibular curve display
ui_guidance.instruction: Show in View 1 and Red view.

operation_descriptions: Set mandibular curve display visibility in Red and View 1

destructive_ops_contract.reason: Display node view restrictions are cleared before assigning explicit view IDs.

steps.description: Manually click and draw on the "Red" view to create a curve along the mandible.

sub_operations.description: Draw mandibular curve on Red view
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Click and draw on Red view to create a curve along the mandible

steps.placement_instructions: Click and draw on Red view to create a curve along the mandible

ui_guidance.title: Draw curve
ui_guidance.instruction: Draw the curve along the mandible in the Red view.

steps.description: Change the layout to "BoneReconstructionPlanner".

ui_guidance.title: Update layout
ui_guidance.instruction: Set layout to BoneReconstructionPlanner.

steps.description: For the R (red) view, toggle off "slice visibility in 3D view".

sub_operations.description: Hide slice in 3D view for Red slice

ui_guidance.title: Toggle off slice visibility in 3D for Red view

operation_descriptions: Hide slice in 3D view for Red slice

steps.description: Manually set how many cut planes you want.

sub_operations.question: How many cut planes do you want?

choice_info.question: How many cut planes do you want?

ui_guidance.title: Number of cut planes
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter number of cutting planes.

steps.description: Click "Add cut plane" button.

Place one mandibular cut plane using the extension's Add cut plane workflow. If the user requested N cut planes, repeat the Add cut plane + place plane interaction N times. Do not store these planes as a rotation plane; they are mandibular cut planes managed by the extension.

sub_operations.placement_instructions: Place this plane, then click Done.

steps.placement_instructions: Place this plane, then click Done.

ui_guidance.title: Place cutting plane
ui_guidance.instruction: Place this cutting plane in the mandible view.

steps.description: Click "Add fibula line" button.
Draw a line over the fibula in "3D View 2", starting with the first point distally and the last point proximally.

sub_operations.placement_instructions: Draw a line over the fibula in 3D View 2, first point distally, last proximally

steps.placement_instructions: Draw a line over the fibula in 3D View 2, first point distally, last proximally

ui_guidance.title: Place line
ui_guidance.instruction: Draw a line over the fibula from distal to proximal in 3D View 2.

steps.description: Click "Center fibula line using fibula model" button to align the line with the anatomical axis of the fibula.

sub_operations.description: Center fibula line using fibula model

steps.description: Tick the "Automatic mandibular planes positioning for maximum bones contact area" checkbox.

sub_operations.description: Enable automatic mandible planes positioning for maximum bone contact

ui_parameter_binding.ui_text: Automatic mandibular planes positioning for maximum bones contact area

properties.text: Automatic mandibular planes positioning for maximum bones contact area

steps.description: Tick the "Make all mandible planes rotate together" checkbox.

sub_operations.description: Enable make all mandible planes rotate together

ui_parameter_binding.ui_text: Make all mandible planes rotate together

properties.text: Make all mandible planes rotate together

ui_guidance.title: Enable linked rotation of mandible planes

steps.description: Click "Update fibula planes over fibula line; update fibula bone pieces and transform them to mandible" to generate the reconstruction and create the fibula cut planes.

sub_operations.description: Generate fibula planes, bone pieces, and transform to mandible

ui_guidance.title: Update reconstruction
ui_guidance.instruction: Generate fibula cut planes and transform to mandible.

steps.description: In the BoneReconstructionPlanner module, in the "Mandible planes" row, toggle on the eye-icon tool button to show the mandibular cut planes.

ui_guidance.title: Show mandible planes
ui_guidance.instruction: Toggle eye icon in Mandible planes row.

steps.description: In the same "Mandible planes" row, toggle on the axes-icon tool button to show the plane interaction handles.

ui_guidance.title: Show plane handles
ui_guidance.instruction: Toggle axes icon in Mandible planes row.

steps.description: Enter the desired value in "Initial space (mm)".

sub_operations.description: Set initial space between mandible planes
sub_operations.question: Enter Initial space (mm)

controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? If not, steps 27-30 will be repeated.

ui_guidance.title: Enter Initial space (mm)
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter value in mm.

steps.description: Enter the desired value in "Between space (mm)".

sub_operations.description: Set between space for additional fibula planes
sub_operations.question: Enter Between space (mm)

controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? If not, steps 27-30 will be repeated.

ui_guidance.title: Enter Between space (mm)
ui_guidance.instruction: Enter value in mm.

steps.description: Manually adjust the mandibular cut planes in the mandible 3D view by dragging the visible plane interaction handles until the positions and rotations look correct.

sub_operations.description: Manually adjust mandible cut planes positions and rotations
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Drag plane interaction handles in mandible 3D view to adjust positions and rotations

steps.placement_instructions: Drag plane interaction handles in mandible 3D view to adjust positions and rotations

controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? If not, steps 27-30 will be repeated.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust cut planes
ui_guidance.instruction: Drag handles to adjust positions and rotations.

steps.description: Click "Update fibula planes over fibula line; update fibula bone pieces and transform them to mandible" to regenerate the reconstruction. Review the result; if it is not satisfactory, repeat steps 27-30 until the reconstruction is satisfactory.

sub_operations.description: Regenerate fibula planes and reconstruction after adjustment

controller.prompt: Is the reconstruction satisfactory? If not, steps 27-30 will be repeated.

ui_guidance.title: Update reconstruction
ui_guidance.instruction: Regenerate after adjustments.

steps.description: When the reconstruction is satisfactory, in the BoneReconstructionPlanner module's "Mandible planes" row, toggle off the eye-icon tool button to hide the mandibular cut planes.

ui_guidance.title: Hide mandible planes
ui_guidance.instruction: Toggle off eye icon in Mandible planes row.

steps.description: Clear the "Show original mandible model" checkbox.

ui_guidance.title: Hide original mandible model
ui_guidance.instruction: Uncheck Show original mandible model checkbox.
